<!-- Read contributing.md before submitting. One logical change per PR. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Add entry
- [ ] Remove entry
- [ ] Edit entry
- [ ] Move entry to a different section
- [ ] Add or rename a section
- [ ] Other

## Entry

Section:

```
- [Title](URL). Description.
```

## Quality criteria

- [ ] Canonical
- [ ] Methodologically useful
- [ ] Pedagogically useful
- [ ] Replication or critique

Notes:

## Checklist

- [ ] Read contributing.md
- [ ] One logical change
- [ ] Canonical URL
- [ ] Sentence case, ends with a period
- [ ] Not already on the list
- [ ] Link resolves
- [ ] Correct order within section
